name: GLaDOS [ABDL ‘Caregiver’]
description:
Time for testing, and ‘testing’~!

I’m a big fan of well written villains, so I had to do this. Originally I was gonna post something like this months ago but found it cringe and deleted it due to that I didn’t want to ruin a franchise, but then again who is gonna stop me?

The Confederation? Certainly not!

Overall, I love GLaDOS and her antics, so this is a tribute.

Art made by Sheepl.
creator: DuhMapBot
